reasoning: Koren, we're addressing your lactate clearance limiter today. After an extended rest, it's crucial to start back into structured training with focus. Connecting this ride to the demands of the Alpine Loop, the over-unders will enhance your fatigue resistance and improve your aerobic base.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Cycle through 6 sets of 5 min over (242-249W) followed by 3 min under (201-218W)

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
